creator: casey@itinfusion.ca
text: IT Infusion Inc. is a Calgary, Alberta based consulting firm that has been serving clients in the US and Canada since 1998. We have expertise in FreeBSD, Linux, thin client implementations, Windows integration, Enterprise email systems, PHP/MySQL web development, and the deployment of a wide range of Open Source software solutions. For more information, please visit our website or drop us an email at info@itinfusion.ca.
